def positive_python_perf_layer_network_calls_tls_context_built_per_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_network_calls_tls_context_built_per_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Network calls. Flag SSLContext or certificate bundle loading per request instead of process-level reuse."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
